info.title: Cartcrft API
info.description: Open-source headless commerce API — agent-native, REST, date-versioned.

BearerJWT.description: Staff/admin JWT obtained from the platform login flow.

ApiKey.description: Cartcrft API key — `cc_pub_*` (storefront, read-only) or `cc_prv_*` (server-side, read-write).
